user_query: Where was the breakfast we cancelled? Check the previous itinerary versions

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 10 > Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast

node_data.name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast
node_data.description: Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node represents the breakfast location in an earlier version of the itinerary, which is necessary to identify what was eventually cancelled.
